text:
### CHAPTER 14 E+W ENFORCEMENT ORDERS AND FINANCIAL COMPENSATION ORDERS: PERSONS NOTIFIED


### Application for enforcement orders and financial compensation orders: duties of the person notified E+W


16.39. —(1) This rule applies where a person who was the child's children's guardian, litigation friend or legal representative in the proceedings in which a [ F18 child arrangements ] order was made has been notified of an application for an enforcement order or for a financial compensation order as required by Practice Direction 12C.


(2) The person who has been notified of the application must—


(3) In this rule, “enforcement order” and “financial compensation order” have the meanings given in rule 12.2.


Textual Amendments


F18 Words in rule 16.39(1) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 42
